sections.paragraph:
Original: צר צוּר

Transliteration: tsûr tsûr

Phonetic: tsoor

BDB Definition:

  1. rock, cliff (noun masculine)
    1. rocky wall, cliff
    2. rock (with flat surface)
    3. block of stone, boulder
    4. rock (specific)
    5. rock (of God)
    6. rock (of heathen gods)
    7. Rock (noun proper deity)

Origin: from H6696

TWOT entry: 1901a

Part(s) of speech: Noun Masculine
